sentences.arabic: شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ هُوَ وَقْتٌ لِلتَّأَمُّلِ وَالعِبَادَةِ وَتَعْزِيزِ الرَّوَابِطِ الأُسَرِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mjesec ramazan je vrijeme za razmišljanje, ibadet i jačanje porodičnih veza.
sentences.translationEn: The month of Ramadan is a time for reflection, worship, and strengthening family bonds.

sentences.arabic: تَجْتَمِعُ العَائِلَاتُ عِنْدَ غُرُوبِ الشَّمْسِ لِتَنَاوُلِ وَجْبَةِ الإِفْطَارِ بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ مِنَ الصِّيَامِ.
sentences.translation: Porodice se okupljaju pri zalasku sunca kako bi iftarile nakon dana posta.
sentences.translationEn: Families gather at sunset to have the Iftar meal after a day of fasting.

sentences.arabic: تُزَيَّنُ الشَّوَارِعُ بِالفَوَانِيسِ المُلَوَّنَةِ الَّتِي تُضِيءُ اللَّيَالِيَ بِبَهْجَةٍ خَاصَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ulice su ukrašene šarenim fenjerima koji osvjetljavaju noći posebnom radošću.
sentences.translationEn: Streets are decorated with colorful lanterns that light up the nights with a special joy.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ تَقَاسُمُ الطَّعَامِ مَعَ الفُقَرَاءِ مُمَارَسَةً جَوْهَرِيَّةً تَعْكِسُ رُوحَ التَّضَامُنِ.
sentences.translation: Dijeljenje hrane sa siromašnima je suštinska praksa koja odražava duh solidarnosti.
sentences.translationEn: Sharing food with the poor is a fundamental practice that reflects the spirit of solidarity.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ صَلَاةِ التَّرَاوِيحِ، تَبْدَأُ الزِّيَارَاتُ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةُ الَّتِي تَمْتَدُّ حَتَّى سَاعَاتٍ مُتَأَخِّرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Nakon teravih-namaza počinju društvene posjete koje traju do kasnih sati.
sentences.translationEn: After the Tarawih prayers, social visits begin and extend until late hours.

sentences.arabic: يَمْتَلِئُ الجَوُّ بِالطُّمَأْنِينَةِ وَالشُّعُورِ بِالتَّجَدُّدِ الرُّوحِيِّ وَالنَّفْسِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Atmosfera je ispunjena smirajem i osjećajem duhovne i psihičke obnove.
sentences.translationEn: The atmosphere is filled with tranquility and a sense of spiritual and psychological renewal.

sentences.arabic: يَنْتَهِي الشَّهْرُ بِاحْتِفَالِ عِيدِ الفِطْرِ، حَيْثُ تَعُمُّ الفَرْحَةُ وَالسُّرُورُ جَمِيعَ القُلُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Mjesec se završava proslavom Ramazanskog bajrama, kada radost i veselje obuzmu sva srca.
sentences.translationEn: The month ends with the celebration of Eid al-Fitr, where joy and happiness spread through all hearts.
